title: Freezing Columns & Changing Width
excerpt: We would like the ability to freeze some columns besides the first pulse. Normally we will write in the problem and have the second column be the machine that is having issues. When you scroll over you can see the machin…

posts.author: Elisa (Elisa Hutchison)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like the ability to freeze some columns besides the first pulse. Normally we will write in the problem and have the second column be the machine that is having issues. When you scroll over you can see the machine anymore. Being able to freeze the columns would be super helpful. Along the same lines, being able to have wrap text would also be really cool.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday already has a pin icon which provides Freezing Column functionality.

If you cannot see the icon, contact support@monday.com and ask for it to be added to your account.

Refer earlier Feature Request for pinning (freezing) a column
https://community.monday.com/t/pinning-a-second-column/578
